{{Infobox character
| name = Tanakite priest
| introduced = Threshold: Stories from Cradle
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Full Tanakite priests are all [[Worldweavers]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|A [[Tanakite priest]] can transform his arm into a spider's leg.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Tanakite priests carry ritual knives.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
